blended.narrative: Ski Wentworth is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 6" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
